crossRefs.label: Remove the assisted door glass regulator.

blocks.text: Confirm that the assistant power window motor rotates smoothly and without abnormality when battery voltage is applied between each terminal.

items: If the power window motor rotates and the position reaches the limit position, the 12V battery shall be disconnected immediately.

items.text: If there is no abnormality in motor rotation, inspection is complete.
If there is no abnormality in motor rotation, inspection is complete.
If there is an abnormality in motor rotation, proceed to the next step
If there is an abnormality in motor rotation, proceed to the next step

blocks.text: Remove the assisted door glass regulator. Confirm that the assistant power window motor (A) rotates smoothly and without abnormality when battery voltage is applied between each terminal.

refs.label: Remove the assisted door glass regulator.
